case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. SHEILA FAULK ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 100042389) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100042389) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT FAULK, SHEILA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042389) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25

DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100042389) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAULK, SHEILA $2,403.10 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,644.10, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100042389) AS TO DEFENDANT FAULK, SHEILA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034998), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. SERVED JUN-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUN-18-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT FAULK, SHEILA
